backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly, so leftover non-BOM documents that were blocking SolidWorks Connector's fresh root open get cleared first. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.51 strongly recommended.

cadBridge.changelog: Fixes 'No active document in SolidWorks' that persisted in 1.8.50. Two root causes 1.8.50 missed: (1) GetProp(ActiveDoc) right after CloseDoc can return a stale COM reference (ROT update lags the close call), so the 1.8.50 activate gate skipped the real fix; (2) if pre-cleanup closed everything (BOM root wasn't open or close pass over-matched), nothing remained to activate -- 1.8.50 had no recovery path. This ship: (a) always force-activate the first remaining open doc and verify by reading ActiveDoc title back; (b) last-resort fallback opens the BOM root via TryOpenByPlmid using request.ItemInfoMap's first EngItemId entry when nothing remained; (c) logs the candidate filename set and closed titles so any future surprise is correlatable from the log without guesswork.
